_comment: [FIXTURE] Slice-hardening #7 — framework-consistent synthetic DataUpload per contract 05. scalar_observables._comment: Phase-locking observable (slice-hardening #6) — the gFDR locus underdetermines gamma_AB (D1), so the Inversion Engine fits gamma_AB against this Kuramoto order parameter via math/phase-locking-model.js. Value = computePhaseLockingR(0.2, -0.2).r. Note: r(gamma_AB) is non-monotonic at this operating point, so this observable is a weak constraint in general — see the README Session Log limitations.
